# terrible_community_proxysql_proxysql_galera_hostgroups (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `backup_writer_hostgroup` (Number) Id of the hostgroup that will contain all the Galera nodes that are standby writers.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `offline_hostgroup` (Number) Id of the hostgroup all failed nodes will be moved to.
- `reader_hostgroup` (Number) Id of the hostgroup that will contain all the Galera nodes that are readers.
- `writer_hostgroup` (Number) Id of the hostgroup that will contain all the Galera nodes that are active writers.

### Optional

- `active` (Number) Enabled (1) or disabled (0) defined hostgroup configuration.
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `comment` (String) Text field that can be used for any purposes defined by the user.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name竊致alue).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `max_transactions_behind` (Number) maximum number of writesets behind the cluster that ProxySQL should allow before shunning the node to prevent stale reads
- `max_writers` (Number) number of Read-Write instances populated in the writer hostgroup
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) When `present` - adds the galera hostgroup, when `absent` - removes the galera hostgroup.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `writer_is_also_reader` (Number) writer_is_also_reader - 0 nodes with `read_only=0` will be placed either in the writer_hostgroup and in the backup_writer_hostgroup after a topology change, these will be excluded from the reader_hostgroup writer_is_also_reader - 1 nodes with `read_only=0` will be placed in the writer_hostgroup or backup_writer_hostgroup and are all also placed in reader_hostgroup after a topology change writer_is_also_reader - 2 Only the nodes with `read_only=0` which are placed in the in the backup_writer_hostgroup are also placed in the reader_hostgroup after a topology change i.e. the nodes with `read_only=0` exceeding the defined `max_writers`.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
- `stdout` (String) The galera hostgroup modified or removed from proxysql.
